_note: Focused LATENCY baseline (not correctness). Picks one turn per path so the flow-log timestamps expose where the per-message seconds go: guardrail-only fast path, full cold agent+MCP path (sampled 3x for variance), and a warm-session follow-up (turn 2 reuses the SDK session but still re-spawns the runner process, isolating fixed process-boot cost). Drive with interakt-test-run.mjs, then analyze /tmp/gantry-dev.log timestamps.
